core_mechanism: a Frobenius-manifold construction: a parameter-dependent family of commutative, associative product (deformed multiplication) structures on a lattice/vector space, whose structure constants are the third derivatives of a single potential function constrained by the WDVV associativity equations, built canonically from the combinatorial data of a reflection group's root system
brief_reason: The abstract computes a deformed (quantum) product expressed via an ADE root system and then generalizes it to a Frobenius manifold giving an n-parameter family of algebra structures on the affine root lattice of any root system, which is exactly a potential-generated associative deformation attached to root-system combinatorics.
